edge_hypothesis: Supertrend direction flips catch macro trend reversals that persist for multiple bars. Prior Supertrend specs achieved PF=2.02 (16 trades) and PF=1.59 (16 trades) — exceptional returns blocked only by the 20-trade minimum gate. Root cause: ADX>25 gate is too restrictive for 4h crypto data, filtering out early-trend entries where ADX hasn't ramped yet. Relaxing ADX to 15-20 captures trend initiations (ADX typically starts low and rises through the trend). Combined with wide exits (fee-killer thesis validated by MACD at PF=1.35), Supertrend should maintain its 1.5+ PF while crossing the trade-count gate. Regime assumption: TRENDING (but with relaxed ADX threshold to capture more trend-starts). Invalidation: if PF < 1.2 with 25+ trades, the relaxed gate is admitting too much noise and the ADX=25 gate was correct.

variants.name: supertrend_adx15_wide_exit
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with relaxed ADX>15 gate and wide exits (3.0x TP / 1.5x stop). ADX=15 is the minimum that distinguishes trending from flat markets — captures early trend entries. Wide exits let trend trades run. Primary goal: exceed 20 trades while preserving PF>1.5.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 15 (minimal trending filter — captures early trends).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
ADX_14 > 15 (minimal trending filter — captures early trends).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips to bearish (direction reversal).
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips to bullish (direction reversal).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Relaxed ADX may admit choppy false trend flips
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: supertrend_adx20_fee_killer
variants.description: Supertrend flip with moderate ADX>20 gate and maximum ride exits (4.0x TP / 2.0x stop). Middle ground between the restrictive ADX=25 (16 trades) and fully relaxed ADX=15. Fee-killer philosophy: 2:1 R:R with very wide exits minimizes round-trip fee impact per dollar of profit. Target: 20-30 trades with PF>1.5.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips to bearish (direction reversal).
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips to bullish (direction reversal).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Ultra-wide TP may rarely be hit on 4h timeframe
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — fee killer variant

variants.name: supertrend_mirrors_macd_winner
variants.description: Supertrend flip using the exact stop/TP ratio that won ACCEPT on MACD (stop=1.0, TP=3.5, 3.5:1 R:R) with ADX>15 for maximum trade count. If the wide-asymmetric payoff structure is the true driver of the MACD success (not MACD signal quality per se), this variant should also achieve PF>1.3. Cross-template validation of the fee-killer exit structure.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed gate for maximum trade count).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed gate for maximum trade count).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Regime gate: ADX_14 > 15 (relaxed to maximize trade count)
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips to bearish (direction reversal).
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips to bullish (direction reversal).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Tight stop on Supertrend may cause more whipsaw stops than MACD
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.
